title: lithospermum altamiranense
intro: Lithospermum altamiranense, also known as the Altamira gromwell, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. This perennial plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its rich content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lithospermum altamiranense include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage, and it has also been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as skin problems and respiratory issues. Lithospermum altamiranense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
